rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CATHERINE L. FREEMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although a "Corrected Amended Petition" should have been a Second Amended Petition, or just the allegations that needed to be corrected should have been made in an amendment to the amended petition. [CRC 7.3] The "Corrected Amended Petition" was not a completely amended petition; the accounting was not attached. The Court waives the defect in order to allow the estate to close. A "fiduciary" is not an appropriate distributee; proposed distribution must identify the specific representative capacity of a fiduciary (e.g., a personal representative, a trustee, an attorney-in-fact, etc.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HULA MAE MCCLENDON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/25/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) No notice was given to Inheritance Advanced, LLC. Notice of hearing shall be served on any person other than a beneficiary under an agreement, request, or instructions of a beneficiary (Probate Code Section 11604). 2) The ending balance of cash assets in must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. The statements or letters must encompass, not precede, the ending date of the accounting period (San Francisco Local Rule 14.34.D). 3) A notice mailed to a person in care of another person is insufficient unless the person entitled to notice is an adult and has directed the party giving notice in writing to send the notice in care of the second person (CRC 7.51(a)(2). Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than November 14, 2025, to avoid further continuance.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/23/25. (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service has been filed. (3) A person's attorney may sign or verify a petition, objection or response, if the petitioner, objector or respondent is unable to do so, unless the person is a fiduciary appointed in the proceeding. [Prob. C. Sect. 1023 and CRC 7.103(c).] A proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any new papers must be received by the assigned examiner by 12/9/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOIS LEE GUILFO
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. APPEARANCE FOR NO RESPONSE: If a hearing is continued for issues raised by an examiner to be addressed and there is no response prior to the continued hearing date, the matter is ordinarily continued again; however, when a report of status has been filed, the hearing is not automatically continued again when there has been no response to the issues. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HAROLD F. POHL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The issues to be cleared or addressed: The supplement indicates that there will be no probate proceedings for the estate of the deceased executor, but it lacks supporting information. It appears necessary to appoint a personal representative for the estate of Charles F. Pohl, as the distribution cannot be made directly to his own heirs/beneficiaries in this estate. Also, the personal representative of Charles F. Pohl's estate should waive the bond accordingly. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF CHRISTOPHER WYATT JUSTEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed: 1) No inventory and appraisal has been e-filed. The last filing was rejected by the clerk on 09/08/2025 (statement about the bond was not signed). 2) No ex parte petition has been filed to request an order depositing funds into a blocked account (MC-355 form). The MC-355 form (proposed order) has been e-lodged, but no underlying ex parte petition has been e-filed. After e-filing the ex parte petition, a hard copy of the petition and proposed order must be provided. 3) No receipt for funds deposited in a blocked account (MC-356 form) is on file. 4) No ex parte petition has been filed to request an order waiving interim accountings of funds continuing to be held in a blocked account. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
